expectedValue.__miroirMatchPattern: no discriminator values found in valueObject and multiple choices exist

miroirTests.miroirTestLabel: returns error if no branch matches the discriminator value, and at least 2 options are possible
returns error if multiple branches match the discriminator value
returns error if first entry a discriminator array matches many options and second entry is not found in valueObject (thus matches 0)
returns error if first entry a discriminator array matches many options and second entry matches no option
returns the given type if only 1 is provided, even if it does not match the given discriminator
selects the correct branch for a literal discriminator
selects the correct branch for an enum discriminator
selects the correct branch for an enum with multiple values
returns found branch based on the first entry in a discriminator array if only 1 option matches, even if the discriminator features many items
returns found branch based on the second entry in a discriminator array if only 1 option matches
returns found branch based on the first entry in a discriminator array if one of the entries has the discrimitator in an 'extend' clause
returns the correct branch for combinerOneToMany in combinerTemplate
returns the correct branch for an object without any discriminator values when exactly 1 branch without any discriminator values exists in the discriminated union
